contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Our Contacts
contact.description: Have a question or want to book a private event? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out through the form or our direct contact details.
contact.pageSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Get in touch with us today.
contact.serviceHoursDescription: Join us for an unforgettable dining experience during our business hours.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.privacyAgreement: By clicking send, you agree to our Privacy Policy.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.
contact.sendError: Failed to send message. Please try again later.

navbar.followUs: Follow us on social media for updates!

companyInformation.title: Company Information
companyInformation.subtitle: Corporate Details
companyInformation.inquiry: For any inquiries regarding corporate information, please contact us at {phone}.

menuPage.title: Our Menu
menuPage.subtitle: Exquisite Selection
menuPage.description: Discover our curated selection of dishes, prepared with the finest ingredients and culinary passion.

brandPage.subtitle: Brand Assets
brandPage.title: Marketing Materials
brandPage.description: Download and print professional marketing assets for {restaurantName}. All designs are pre-populated with your restaurant's information.
brandPage.ctaDescription: Contact our support team for personalized marketing materials and branding consultations.
brandPage.flyerDescription: Discover the flavors of {restaurantName}. We serve authentic dishes prepared with fresh, local ingredients.

aboutPhilosophy.title: Our Philosophy
aboutPhilosophy.description: We believe in sourcing the freshest local ingredients to create authentic, memorable dining experiences for every guest.

culinaryExcellence.title: Culinary Excellence
culinaryExcellence.description: Our chefs bring years of tradition and innovation to the kitchen, ensuring every dish is a masterpiece of flavor and presentation.

communityFocused.title: Community Focused
communityFocused.description: More than just a restaurant, we are a gathering place for friends and family, dedicated to enriching our local neighborhood.
